news.title: India office leasing rises 10% to 21.6 million sq ft in Q1 2026: Report
news.para: Strong occupier demand led by technology firms and GCCs pushed office absorption to a five-year high in Q1 2026, even as new supply moderated and vacancy levels eased.

news.title: UK: Vistry installs new CEO as pressure mounts on strategy
news.para: British construction company Vistry has appointed Adam Daniels as its new chief executive, effective immediately. He succeeds Greg Fitzgerald, who has resigned from both CEO and chair positions. The housing market in the UK is currently facing tough obstacles, including slumping demand and declining profit margins.

news.title: Puravankara's sales jump 55% to ₹7,407 crore in FY26
news.para: Puravankara reported a sharp rise in sales with Q4 bookings up 190% and full-year sales growing 55% in FY26, supported by new launches and improved price realisations.

news.title: Mangaluru civic body serves notices to houses, apartments as sewage pollutes Moilykere
news.para: Mangaluru City Corporation has issued notices to houses and apartments near Moilykere lake after sewage was found entering the water body. The civic body plans legal action against violators due to the lack of an underground drainage network in the area. Residents have been requesting UGD connections for years to resolve the persistent pollution.

news.title: Shree KB Group invests ₹422 crore to develop shopping mall in Greater Noida West
news.para: Shree KB Group is set to invest ₹425 crore in its upcoming mall, KB West Walk, in Greater Noida West. The 7.50 lakh sq ft development will include 1,290 units for sale and lease, with construction costs estimated at ₹300 crore. The project is anticipated to be completed by October 2030.

news.title: Two companies in fray for Nagpur metro phase-III DPR, groundwork likely to begin in May
news.para: The tendering process for Nagpur Metro's Phase 3 Detailed Project Report (DPR) has reached the evaluation stage with two firms bidding. This crucial report will outline the largest expansion yet, covering new corridors. On-ground work is anticipated to commence in May after consultant appointment.

news.title: Cement companies' margins to shrink 150-200 bps in FY27 on higher energy costs: Crisil
news.para: Rising fuel and freight costs amid geopolitical tensions are set to pressure cement makers’ profitability in FY27, even as demand remains steady and prices see modest hikes.

news.title: Engineer flags commercial use of residential properties in Guwahati
news.para: Guwahati Municipal Corporation (GMC) is reviewing a Supreme Court order directing inquiries into the misuse of residential areas for commercial purposes. Mayor Mrigen Sarania acknowledged buildings with mixed-use permits, while a consultant engineer highlighted rampant unauthorized commercial activity and violations of zoning regulations. This has led to unplanned growth and infrastructure issues like waterlogging.

news.title: Patna civic body to survey properties to plug revenue losses, curb misuse
news.para: The Patna Municipal Corporation is launching a citywide survey to bridge the significant gap between electricity connections and registered properties. This initiative aims to identify unregistered holdings, verify self-assessments, and detect residential properties misused for commercial purposes, aligning with a Supreme Court directive.

news.title: Construction firm accused of cheating customers by failing to deliver villas in Kollur, Telangana
news.para: A Hyderabad construction firm faces cheating accusations after allegedly collecting crores from customers for villas in Kollur without delivering possession. The company lured buyers with a pre-launch offer, accepting substantial deposits before securing necessary RERA and HMDA permissions. A criminal case has been registered against the management for criminal breach of trust and cheating.

news.title: Goa: Over 18,000 sq meters land converted in Bardez to settlement zones
news.para: The Town and Country Planning department has granted final approvals for six zone change proposals, converting over 18,000 sqm of land to settlement zones, primarily in Bardez and Pernem. These approvals, concentrated in Sircaim and Mandrem, are subject to the outcome of pending writ petitions before the Bombay High Court.

news.title: About 24 industrial plots up for grabs across Greater Noida sectors
news.para: Greater Noida Industrial Development Authority has launched a scheme offering 24 industrial plots to attract investment and boost growth. The plots, ranging from 9,000 sqm to 1 lakh sqm, are located across multiple sectors and aim to enhance the region's manufacturing and logistics appeal. Applications are open until May 12, with evaluation based on financial strength and employment potential.

news.title: Legalization of 450 illegal colonies in Indore hits roadblock
news.para: Over 450 unauthorized colonies in Indore face regularization hurdles as government departments raise objections. Complex land-use disputes, including those on urban land ceiling and green belt areas, have stalled the process. Many colonies lack approved plans and development fee compliance, impacting residents' eligibility for loans and infrastructure development.

news.title: Jammu & Kashmir: 415 building permits issued by TDAs in 2025-26
news.para: Building permissions issued by Jammu and Kashmir's tourism development authorities have surged, surpassing previous years. Over 2,600 homestays are now registered, boosting accommodation options. Authorities are actively addressing unauthorized constructions across popular tourist spots, ensuring regulated development for a thriving tourism future.

news.title: HUDCO, NBCC sign MoUs for Delhi redevelopment, asset monetisation
news.para: Housing and Urban Development Corporation Limited (HUDCO) on Saturday said it has signed two Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) with NBCC (India) Limited to collaborate on redevelopment and asset monetisation projects. According to a stock exchange filing, "HUDCO has signed two Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) with NBCC (India) Limited (NBCC), on 11th April, 2026."

news.title: Hawelia Group gets UP-RERA nod to complete stalled housing project in Greater Noida
news.para: Hawelia Group has committed a substantial Rs 770 crore to rejuvenate a halted residential venture in Greater Noida, benefitting more than 2000 prospective homeowners. The project, 'Shri Radha Sky Gardens', is set to wrap up within the next 42 to 48 months.

news.title: NCLAT reaffirms project-specific insolvency proceedings against realty firms
news.para: The National Company Law Appellate Tribunal has made a pivotal assertion regarding homebuyers’ rights in insolvency cases, stipulating that disputes must be confined to the specific project where defaults have occurred. This ruling effectively shields unrelated real estate ventures from being implicated in insolvency actions.

news.title: Private equity investments in real estate rise 66% to $1.2 billion in Q1 2026: Savills
news.para: Private equity investments in Indian real estate rose 66% year-on-year to $1.2 billion in Q1 2026, led by office assets and strong domestic investor participation amid cautious foreign inflows.

news.title: Ranchi: Harmu Housing Colony faces crackdown on commercial establishments
news.para: Ranchi Municipal Corporation is serving notices to businesses operating in Harmu Housing Colony. Traders and residents are questioning the move, highlighting years of operation and existing licenses. They argue that closing these establishments will impact both businesses and the local community. Officials maintain the colony was designated for residential use only.

news.title: Haryana revises affordable housing policy, mandates one parking space per unit
news.para: Haryana has amended its Affordable Housing Policy, mandating one car parking space per unit and revising price caps across cities, with Gurugram rates increased to ₹5,575 per sq ft. The changes will apply to upcoming allotments and partially to ongoing projects, subject to buyer consent.
